caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with several garments, including a white mannequin wearing a white shirt. Small logos, including one that reads "SURE" and another that reads "BROKE BOY TV", are visible in the bottom corners of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and reacting; he begins with a slight smile, then shifts his gaze and expression to a more neutral, listening posture, and finally looks slightly downward with a contemplative expression. The camera remains stationary as the man's facial expressions and head position shift slightly over time.
